title: Re:Creation
body:
# Welcome to Re:Creation!
This is a modpack to make Create more intresting, and making contraptions more fun. I recommend to play on a server with friends!


**_Modpack was inspired by ReCreate from the content creator Shalz. He made a server with his friends, and it used a lot of create addons. This is just a lil' remaster and adds WAY more mods, but its more fun._**


This modpack is a certified BANGER for create stuff, and general stuff. And it gets updated quite frequently! Of course, at this point you may be asking yourself: "Is this modpack even pointing towards create anymore?" Well, sort of yes! Just look at all of the addons and other stuff!

By the way, I added a datapack to the modpack. Its small, because it just adds a recipe for the Exposure photo album. Im probably gonna update it though. If you do want it, it should be in the "Datapacks" folder inside the modpack, and then you can add it to your world if you want.

# FAQ:

**How do I report issues?**

_Currently, there isnt a way, and so far the only issue ive seen in my 160h of playing this modpack._

**Is there going to be a fabric version of the modpack?**

_Probably not, because create on fabric is only on version 0.5.1j from what i know. And juggling a another version of the pack isnt easy._

**is there going to be a version for 1.21.1 of minecraft?**

_It is in consideration, as I would looove having flashback. (if it would even work lmao). And having the mace would be cool, but again, juggling multiple versions of the modpack isnt easy._

**When I launch the modpack it gives me an error that a mod couldnt load, how do i fix it!!?**

_Just disable the mod it says couldnt load, launch the game. Once in main menu, you can reenable that mod that couldnt load, it should work after that._


##                                     Special thanks:

To some of my friends who recommended some of the mods to me, ending up in me adding them.

MCreator, a program made by Pylo. Used for the datapack included, and my music disc mod, CimkNo Music.
